role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed vegetation density, climate cues, and road maintenance quality.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified Cupressaceae and broadleaf shrubs, correctly attributing them to the subtropical biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed guardrail types, curb styles, and utility pole hardware.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure aesthetics (fencing, poles) to distinguish between East Asian neighbors.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Japan as the location. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence regarding infrastructure and vegetation. The tournament successfully used this evidence to distinguish Japan from its closest lookalikes (Taiwan, South Korea).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of lush greenery and road quality match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of coniferous and broadleaf mix match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of guardrails, curbs, and poles match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of fencing and pole hardware match the image.
